300.$description: Light Cobalt Blue — brand colour, decorative use

500.$description: Interactive cobalt — primary actions (5.3:1 on white, AA)

primary.$description: Primary typeface — all text across portfolio

200.$description: Platinum Grey — light surface and borders

400.$description: Outermost containers — currently sharp, update when needed

brand.$description: Cobalt indicators, progress fills in dark.

info.$description: Info indicators in dark. Aliases cobalt.

primary.$description: Primary CTA button — light cobalt on dark. Pair with foreground/on-action.

primary-pressed.$description: CTA button pressed — slightly deeper cobalt.

brand.$description: Brand cobalt surface — deeper cobalt for dark branded sections.

brand-subtle.$description: Subtle brand surface — dark card with blue cast for soft brand accents.

card.$description: Card surfaces — slightly lifted from page. Pair with border/default.

disabled.$description: Disabled state — inactive elements in dark mode.

elevated.$description: Elevated surface — dropdowns, popovers, sticky headers.

info.$description: Info background — dark cobalt tint. Aliases brand.

input.$description: Form inputs — same as card in dark mode.

inverse.$description: Inverted surface — light chip/badge on dark.

overlay.$description: Modal scrim — deep black at high opacity.

page.$description: Page background — near-black blue-grey. Reduces eye strain in low light.

default.$description: Standard card edges and dividers — blue-grey tinted.

focus.$description: Keyboard focus ring — cobalt/300 in dark. Always visible.

strong.$description: Prominent edge — selected states, strong dividers in dark.

subtle.$description: Barely-there dividers — section separators in dark.

accent.$description: Brand cobalt text — links, active nav items, cobalt-accented labels and accents.

brand.$description: Brand cobalt text in dark — links, active nav items.

disabled.$description: Disabled text and icons in dark mode.

error.$description: Error text and icons in dark mode.

info.$description: Info text and icons in dark mode. Aliases brand cobalt.

inverse.$description: Dark text on inverted light surfaces.

link-hover.$description: Link colour on hover. One step darker than text/brand in light mode, one step lighter in dark mode (matches the action-button hover direction convention).

link-visited.$description: Link colour after the user has visited it. One step further than hover in the same direction (darker in light mode, lighter in dark mode).

on-action.$description: Text/icons on background/action — off-black on cobalt/300 (8.5:1 contrast).

on-action-secondary.$description: Off-white text for the solid-fill Secondary button — static across themes since background/action/secondary does not change between Light and Dark.

primary.$description: Body copy in dark mode — Off White. Maximum contrast against dark surfaces.

secondary.$description: Secondary text — muted but readable. Timestamps, tags, metadata.

success.$description: Success text and icons in dark mode.

tertiary.$description: Placeholder text, helper text, captions. Least prominent.

warning.$description: Warning text and icons in dark mode.

brand.$description: Cobalt indicator dots, progress fills, icon fills, tag backgrounds.

success.$description: Check icons, progress success, positive metric indicators.

primary.$description: Primary CTA button. Pair with foreground/on-action.

brand.$description: Brand cobalt surface — branded callouts, highlights.

brand-subtle.$description: Subtle cobalt tint — tags, selected states, soft brand accents.

card.$description: Card/container surfaces — panels holding content. Pair with border/default.

disabled.$description: Disabled state — inactive buttons and inputs. Not for interactive elements.

elevated.$description: Elevated surface — popovers, tooltips, sticky headers.

error.$description: Error background — validation errors, destructive actions.

info.$description: Info background — neutral informational banners. Aliases brand.

inverse.$description: Inverted surface — dark chip/badge on light mode.

overlay.$description: Modal scrim — darkens page to focus attention on elevated content.

page.$description: Page background — Off White outermost surface.

success.$description: Success background — confirmation banners, success toasts.

warning.$description: Warning background — caution banners, advisory states.

brand.$description: Brand-coloured border — cobalt edges for callouts, selected tags.

default.$description: Standard card edges, input borders, content dividers.

error.$description: Error state border — error banners, invalid inputs.

focus.$description: Keyboard focus ring — 2px outline. Always visible for accessibility.

strong.$description: Prominent edge — selected/active states, strong dividers.

subtle.$description: Barely-there dividers — section separators, list rules.

success.$description: Success state border — success banners, valid inputs.

accent.$description: Brand cobalt text — links, active nav items, cobalt-accented labels and accents.

brand.$description: Brand cobalt text — links, active nav items, cobalt-accented labels.

disabled.$description: Disabled text and icons. Never on interactive elements.

error.$description: Error text and icons — validation messages.

info.$description: Info text and icons. Aliases brand cobalt.

inverse.$description: Text on inverted/dark surfaces in light mode.

link-hover.$description: Link colour on hover. One step darker than text/brand in light mode, one step lighter in dark mode (matches the action-button hover direction convention).

link-visited.$description: Link colour after the user has visited it. One step further than hover in the same direction (darker in light mode, lighter in dark mode).

on-action.$description: Text/icons on background/action buttons — white on cobalt/500.

on-action-secondary.$description: Off-white text for the solid-fill Secondary button — static across themes since background/action/secondary does not change between Light and Dark.

primary.$description: Body copy and long-form reading text. Highest contrast. Pairs with background/page.

success.$description: Success text and icons — confirmation messages.

tertiary.$description: Placeholder, helper text, captions. Least prominent foreground.

warning.$description: Warning text and icons — caution messages.

grid-margin.$description: Inner container padding. Matches spacing/page-margin. 32px desktop.

max-content-width.$description: Maximum content width — container centred at this width. 1200px desktop.

reading-column-width.$description: Max width for long-form body text. Optimal reading measure. 720px desktop.

small.$description: Deepest nested — tags, chips, indicators inside a card. 4px.

xl.$description: Outermost containers — currently sharp (0px). Update primitive when needed.

card-padding.$description: Internal padding for project cards. 24px desktop.

content-gap.$description: Between content blocks within a section. 32px desktop.

inline-gap.$description: Between inline elements — icon + label. 8px both.

overline-gap.$description: Between inline elements — icon + label. 8px both.

page-margin.$description: Inner padding of the max-width container. 32px desktop.

row-gap.$description: Between sibling elements in a row. 16px desktop.

section-gap.$description: Between major page sections — hero/work/about. 96px desktop.

stack-gap.$description: Between stacked elements in a column. 16px desktop.

text-stack-gap.$description: Vertical rhythm between stacked text lines (title + caption). 8px desktop.

line-height.$description: Body line height — generous for readability. 26px desktop.

size.$description: Default long-form reading text. Case study content. 16px both viewports.

line-height.$description: Display line height — tight for large type.

size.$description: Homepage hero, case study titles at full scale. 48px desktop.

weight.$description: Label weight — medium. Distinguishes UI text from body copy.

letter-spacing.$description: Overline letter spacing — wide, adds visual texture.

size.$description: Category labels, project tags above a heading. 12px.

reading-column-width.$description: Full-width reading on mobile — uses frame width.

component-padding.$description: Buttons, inputs. 16px mobile — minimum, no smaller.

line-height.$description: Body line height mobile — more generous for narrow screens. 28px.

size.$description: Body text. 16px — consistent with desktop for scale cohesion.
